metadata.name: Install Ubuntu VM Core Packages
metadata.description: Installs essential packages for Ubuntu virtual machines, including Prometheus node exporter, NFS client utilities, and QEMU guest agent.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
This playbook installs a baseline package set for Ubuntu virtual machines.

## Prerequisites
- Confirm the target VMs are Ubuntu systems with the required repositories available.
- Review whether every selected host should run node exporter, NFS utilities, and the QEMU guest agent.

## Run
1. Render `main.yml` and review the package assumptions.
2. Run the playbook against the intended VM workload hosts. The workload inventory already provides the host selection, so the playbook runs against `all` selected hosts.
3. Verify the installed services are enabled and healthy after the play completes.

## Docs
- [Ubuntu Server Documentation](https://ubuntu.com/server/docs)
- [Prometheus Node Exporter](https://github.com/prometheus/node_exporter)
